title: 4pk Pressed Dog Bones, Tasty Flavoured Dog Chew Bones for Dogs, Puppies & Large Breeds, Low Fat High Protein Long Lasting Chew & Reward Treats for Training, Supports Pet Dental Health & Chewing Needs
features: High Protein, Low Fat Dog Chew Treats - These dog chew bones are packed with protein to support muscle health, while staying low in fat for a balanced, healthy diet. Ideal dog treats bones for daily feeding

Supports Dental Health & Chewing Needs - Natural chewing action helps clean teeth and reduce plaque. These dog bones for aggressive chewers work as long lasting dog chews and chew dog toys for oral care

Perfect for Dogs of All Sizes - At 4" and 30g, these dog bones for small dogs and dog bones for medium dogs deliver satisfying chewing for a variety of breeds, including puppy bones and large dog chew toys
Tasty Flavour Dogs Love - Dogs crave the taste of these flavoured dog bones. Excellent as tasty bone dog chew treats or dog peanut butter toy alternatives for rewarding good behaviour

Versatile Training & Reward Treats - These chewy dog toys double as dog chew treats, perfect for training sessions, rewarding good behaviour, or as dog bone gifts. Fresh drinking water should always be available.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Essential Dog Travel & Care Solutions for Healthy & Happy Adventures Pressed Bones 4pk Add To Basket 2pk Dog Car Seat Belts Add To Basket 2pk Collapsible Dog Bowl Add To Basket 2pc Dual Ended Toothbrush Buying Options 2pk Dog Grooming Brush Add To Basket 1 Dog Travel Water Bottle Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.7 out of 5 stars 4 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,822 4.4 out of 5 stars 443 4.1 out of 5 stars 87 4.0 out of 5 stars 97 4.0 out of 5 stars 20 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.79 £ 4 . 79 — £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 PORTABLE ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ EASY TO USE ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ INDOOR/ OUTDOOR USE ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ PET FRIENDLY ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ MULTIPACK ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What makes these dog chew bones suitable for daily feeding? Each bone is high in protein and low in fat, supporting healthy muscles while helping maintain your dog’s ideal weight with every chew. Are these dog bones easy to digest for all breeds? Yes, these dog chews are made from natural ingredients, making them easier to digest while delivering long-lasting chewing satisfaction. How do these bones support dental health? The chewing action naturally helps reduce plaque and tartar, promoting cleaner teeth and healthier gums during regular chewing sessions. What dog sizes are these chews best suited for? At 4" and 30g, these bones are ideal for puppies, small dogs, medium breeds and even some larger dogs who enjoy satisfying chew treats. Can these be used for training and rewards? Absolutely. Their tasty flavour makes them perfect as reward treats for training, good behaviour reinforcement, or daily enjoyment.
